description: Crush-worthy colouring in this oh-so-cute flip flop style sandal from catwalk. Wear this with matching kurtas or tops and look great either way! Upper Woody footbed with texturing and a heel patch Branding embossed on a heel patch Thong style straps with a sequinned heart at the crux of the straps Outsole TPU outsole with a floral lug at the heel Sandal care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
